summary: Review flags incorrect concert date metadata, offering no insight into audio or performance quality
review: The sole reviewer points out that the recording is mislabeled as a 1989 show when it should be dated 10/10/80. No comments are made about the soundboard source, mix clarity, or the musical performance, leaving both recording and show quality indeterminate.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review focused on metadata error; no information on music or sound quality, resulting in a low confidence rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No audio quality comments provided; only date discrepancy mentioned.
